name: Reference
description: This is a reference for the objects below, not a variant. Each field is an example or description of its content.
location: The line range where the component is located (e.g. #L10-L20 means the component is between line 10 and 20). The range may not be exact, so leave a margin of error.

name: Default
description: Header navigation with a standard baseline structure for general-purpose use.

name: Pill Nav
description: Header navigation with rounded pill-style navigation links in the header bar.

name: Centered Logo
description: Header navigation with centered brand logo with navigation distributed around it.

name: Dark Glassmorphism
description: Header navigation with dark translucent navigation bar with blur and glass depth.

name: Announcement Bar
description: Header navigation with header with a top announcement strip for updates.

name: Search bar
description: Header navigation with header variant with integrated prominent search input.

name: Menu dropdown
description: Header navigation with navigation menus with dropdown panels for sub-links.

name: Floating island
description: Header navigation with floating rounded navbar detached from page edges.

name: Split CTA
description: Header navigation with split header layout that gives extra emphasis to CTA actions.
